data.title: BOMA International Begins Canvassing Process for Latest Mixed-Use Properties Standard
data.description: The Building Owners and Managers Association (BOMA) International is in the process of completing updates to its latest floor measurement standard, the BOMA For Mixed-Use Properties Standard Method of Measurement (Z65.6). BOMA is currently seeking participation from individuals looking to vote on the adoption of the standard.

data.title: Coralogix and Skyflow Redefine Privacy-Safe Observability for the AI Era
data.description: In a recent partnership announcement, Coralogix and Skyflow have joined forces to address the issue of sensitive data in logs restricting AI's capabilities. This collaboration aims to safeguard data while maintaining observability for AI-centric workflows. This partnership is crucial in the tech industry, especially as organizations deal with increasing amounts of data. By teaming up, Coralogix and Skyflow aim to enhance data security and usability for AI applications. This joint effort signifies a significant step forward in ensuring data protection and efficiency in the integration of AI technologies.

data.title: Cleerly AI-QCT Demonstrates High Agreement with Invasive IVUS in INVICTUS Registry
data.description: In Vienna, Austria, Cleerly, a top player in AI-driven cardiovascular imaging analysis, revealed results from the INVICTUS registry at the European Congress of Radiology (ECR 2026). The presentation, “AI-Based CCTA Quantification of Atherosclerosis Burden: Comparison With IVUS in INVICTUS Registry,” was delivered by Rine Nakanishi, MD, PhD, at the Clinical Trials in Radiology: Spotlight Session on March 5, 2026. This multicenter study showcased groundbreaking insights into cardiovascular health, garnering attention at the conference.

data.title: Eightco's $90M OpenAI Bet Brings Tom Lee To Board But Stock Can't Break $1
data.description: Eightco Holdings (NASDAQ: ORBS) has made an additional investment of $40 million in OpenAI, making their total commitment reach $90 million. Moreover, Tom Lee, the Chairman of Bitmine (NYSE: BMNR), has joined the board of OpenAI. With this investment, OpenAI now represents about 30% of Eightco's total treasury. Their holdings include 277.2 million WLD tokens, 11,068 ETH, and $76 million in cash and stablecoins. Additionally, Eightco holds almost 10% of the current WLD supply in circulation, making it the largest public market participant in the Worldcoin ecosystem. CEO of Eightco, Kevin O'Donnell, stated, "Access to high-growth private companies has historically been limited to institutional investors, and we're proud to offer retail investors meaningful exposure to one of the most important AI companies in the world." They have recently announced $125 million in new funding commitments, with $75 million being led by... (remaining info not provided in the original text).

data.title: Matrix Expands Its 2026 Brand Ambassador Roster with New Creative Powerhouses
data.description: Matrix, a renowned player in professional haircare, has boosted its elite creative team by welcoming Rubi Talavera and Lucy Seitz. This move underscores the brand's dedication to inclusivity, education, and cutting-edge artistry. The announcement was made in New York on March 20, 2026. Matrix's commitment to innovation and creativity continues to grow with the addition of these two talented individuals.

data.title: Telekom Srbija to Open 9th Shop in Germany, Marking Expansion Milestone
data.description: Telekom Srbija Group is set to inaugurate its 9th retail outlet in Germany on March 26 in Offenbach, showcasing its entrance into one of Europe’s primary telecommunications markets and a critical international growth focus for the corporation. This new store in Offenbach is part of Telekom Srbija’s strategy to create a comprehensive retail and distribution network throughout Germany. With a strong presence in pivotal areas, the company is making steady progress in expanding its operations.

data.title: Enviri Announces Filing of Form 10 Registration Statement and Anticipated Board of Directors in Connection with Planned Spin-off of Harsco Environmental and Rail Businesses (“New Enviri”)
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI) disclosed the submission of an initial Form 10 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for the separation of Harsco Environmental and Rail into a distinct publicly traded entity named "New Enviri." The spin-off is anticipated to transpire just before the divestiture of the Clean Earth sector to Veolia Environnement S.A. No specific timeline was provided for the spin-off and sale.
